sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: AppLovin Corp의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 1분기 중 클래스 A 보통주 220만 주를 10억 달러에 자사주 매입·소각했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 분기 말 클래스 A·B 보통주 발행주식 수는 3억 3,600만 주였습니다.

watchItems.text: 광고 플랫폼 매출 성장세와 84% 수준의 높은 조정 EBITDA 마진 유지 여부가 향후 핵심 관전 포인트입니다.
활발한 자사주 매입이 지속되는 가운데 주당 가치 제고 흐름에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991-1q26earningspre.htm PRESS RELEASE, DATED MAY 6, 2026 Document Exhibit 99.1 AppLovin Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results PALO ALTO – May 6, 2026 – AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP) (“AppLovin”), a leading marketing platform, today announced financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 and posted a financial update on its Investor Relations website located at https://investors.applovin.com . First Quarter 2026 Financial Highlights: Quarter Ended March 31, (In millions, except percentages) 2026 2025 % Change Revenue $1,842 $1,159 59 % Net Income $1,206 $576 109 % Net Income from Continuing Operations $1,206 $724 67 % Adjusted EBITDA $1,557 $938 66 %   Normalized numeric aliases: $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $1,842 = 1,842달러; $1,159 = 1,159달러; $1,206 = 1,206달러; $576 = 576달러; $724 = 724달러; $1,557 = 1,557달러; $938 = 938달러; 1,842 million = 18억 4,200만 달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; 1,159 million = 11억 5,900만 달러; 1,206 million = 12억 600만 달러; 1,557 million = 15억 5,700만 달러.

$3.57 and $3.56, respectively, for the first quarter 2026. ● During the first quarter 2026, we repurchased and withheld 2.2 million shares of our Class A common stock, for a total cost of $1.0 billion 1 . At the end of 1Q 2026, we had 336 million shares of our Class A and Class B common stock outstanding. Second Quarter 2026 Financial Guidance Summary 2 2Q26 (In millions, except percentages) Low High Revenue $1,915 $1,945 Adjusted EBITDA 1,615 1,645 Adjusted EBITDA Margin 84% 85% 1 Includes repurchased shares as well as withholdings upon net share settlement of vested equity awards. Total cost includes repurchase costs, including commissions and fees, as well as cash paid in connect  Normalized numeric aliases: 2.2 million = 220만 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; 336 million = 3억 3,600만 달러; $3.57 = 3.57달러; $3.56 = 3.56달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $1,915 = 1,915달러; $1,945 = 1,945달러; 1,945 million = 19억 4,500만 달러; 1,915 million = 19억 1,500만 달러; 1,615 million = 16억 1,500만 달러; 1,645 million = 16억 4,500만 달러.
